title: Overview · Cloudflare WARP client docs
content: Get this page as Markdown: https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/index.md (append index.md) or send Accept: text/markdown to https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/ For this product's page index use https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/llms.txt For bulk access (single file, use for large-context ingestion or vectorization): this product's full docs at https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/llms-full.txt Get started Overview Android iOS Linux macOS Windows Related products On this page Related products Was this helpful WARP Client Cloudflare WARP client Connect to the Internet faster and in a more secure way The Cloudflare WARP client allows individuals to have a faster, more secure, and more private experience online The WARP client sits between your device and the Internet, and has several connection modes to better suit different needs Looking for Zero Trust This documentation is for the consumer version of WARP (1.1.1.1 with WARP) If you are using WARP for Zero Trust security, refer to the Cloudflare One Client documentation The WARP client has several modes to better suit your connection needs The WARP client runs on several operating systems, including iOS and Android Related products 1.1.1.1 is Cloudflare’s public DNS resolver It offers a fast and private way to browse the Internet The enterprise version of WARP allows organizations to apply security policies to corporate devices New to Cloudflare Privacy Policy Terms of Use Report Security Issues Cookie Settings Last updated: Mar 17, 2026 Was this helpful?
